3154240.name: Tomoyo
3154240.description: You have been selected to be the new manager of the Tomoyo apartments. Customize every part of your residents look, and personality. Get to know your residents by spending time with them, giving them gift, decorating their apartments, and developing a relationship with them, or between them. Watch as they get into awkward situations, develop drama filled love triangles, and maybe even get married. Keep your residents happy, and steadily raise their rent. Grow your apartment to open up new locations, shops, dialogue options, furniture, and games.
3154240.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
